policy: Every pending or skipped/gated test file must have owner, launch risk, reason, action, and verification before final QA can be claimed.

pendingTests.reason: Pending legacy compost scoring coverage is outside default Vitest includes.
pendingTests.action: Unpend or retire before marketing compost scoring behavior.

pendingTests.reason: Context cache behavior is pending and not part of launch proof.
pendingTests.action: Promote with deterministic cache fixtures or delete if obsolete.

pendingTests.reason: Best-of-n loop behavior is pending and excluded from current gates.
pendingTests.action: Promote before claiming production best-of-n selection.

pendingTests.reason: Thinking-path assertions are pending and not launch evidence.
pendingTests.action: Promote or archive before reasoning-path claims.

pendingTests.reason: Seed quality e2e flow is pending and outside default e2e proof.
pendingTests.action: Promote when seed quality is part of launch copy.

pendingTests.reason: Tier-based generator pending coverage is not default proof.
pendingTests.action: Promote focused generator contract tests during FQA-033 remediation.

pendingTests.reason: GUI config API integration is pending and not in launch smoke.
pendingTests.action: Promote before claiming config API support.

pendingTests.reason: Preview server API integration is pending and outside current proof.
pendingTests.action: Promote before preview API launch claims.

pendingTests.reason: Versioned preview coverage is pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote or explicitly exclude versioned preview from launch scope.

pendingTests.reason: Ralph collaboration integration is pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote before collaboration workflow claims.

pendingTests.reason: Soup loop novelty integration is pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote or archive before novelty-loop claims.

pendingTests.reason: TUI confirm/cancel flow is pending while Bubble Tea is a launch surface.
pendingTests.action: Promote or replace with Bubble Tea Go coverage before TUI safety claims.
pendingTests.verification: pnpm vitest run test/pending/tui/confirm-flow.test.ts --coverage=false; pnpm bubbletea:test

pendingTests.reason: Task loading path is pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote before task-loading claims.

pendingTests.reason: Hook system tests remain pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote or archive before hook runtime claims.

pendingTests.reason: Progressive design tier tests are pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote before design-tier claims.

pendingTests.reason: Text generative unit coverage is pending while textgen is a creative domain.
pendingTests.action: Promote or cover through all-domain live proof before textgen launch claims.

pendingTests.reason: Color extraction coverage is pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote before aesthetic-analysis claims.

pendingTests.reason: Color theory coverage is pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote before color-theory claims.

pendingTests.reason: Creative preference extraction tests are pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote before preference-learning claims.

pendingTests.reason: Style blending tests are pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote before style-blending claims.

pendingTests.reason: Evaluation memo tests are pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote before collaborative evaluation claims.

pendingTests.reason: Collaboration board tests are pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote before collaboration claims.

pendingTests.reason: Compositor unit tests are pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote or rely on public composition example smoke with explicit scope.

pendingTests.reason: Config loader typeguard coverage is pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote before config-loader claims.

pendingTests.reason: Model routing tests are pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote before model-routing launch claims.

pendingTests.reason: Context accumulation coverage is pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote or archive before context accumulation claims.

pendingTests.reason: Core context accumulation coverage is pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote before context accumulation claims.

pendingTests.reason: Legacy RalphLoop unit coverage is pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote relevant cases or retire obsolete cases before RalphLoop claims.

pendingTests.reason: Autofix orchestrator coverage is pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote before autofix claims.

pendingTests.reason: P5 LLM generator coverage is pending while empty-code failures block integration.
pendingTests.action: Promote during FQA-033 generator empty-output remediation.

pendingTests.reason: Particle generator coverage is pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote before particle-system claims.

pendingTests.reason: GUI live organism state coverage is pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote before live-organism UI claims.

pendingTests.reason: Alternate Ralph loop coverage is pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote or retire after current RalphLoop tests cover the behavior.

pendingTests.reason: Scoring result type coverage is pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote before scoring API claims.

pendingTests.reason: Shader generator coverage is pending while GLSL is a creative domain.
pendingTests.action: Promote or cover through all-domain live proof before GLSL launch claims.

pendingTests.reason: Soup loop unit coverage is pending.
pendingTests.action: Promote or archive before soup-loop claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: CSRF suite is skipped in the default test environment.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run under a non-test security smoke before security claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Security headers are part of launch trust proof.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Keep in default security suite and rerun for release.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Rate limiting is part of launch trust proof.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Keep in default security suite and rerun for release.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Browser/render suite is gated on local browser availability.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run in browser/e2e lane before render launch claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Sandbox suite is skipped under CI or unavailable CDN.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run in slow/browser lane before sandbox claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Dual LLM integration is skipped in CI or without local backend.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run only for live-provider/local-backend claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Renderer integration is gated on browser/CDN availability.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run in slow/browser lane before renderer claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Three route/persona/code-extraction assertions are explicitly skipped.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Unskip before claiming production-ready swarm output.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Self-improve e2e is skipped in CI.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run before self-improve workflow launch claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Guardrail generation tests skip without configured LLM.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run with provider config before live guardrail claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Cloud provider smoke is gated behind RUN_CLOUD_MODEL_TESTS.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for live-provider release claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Cloud full-loop tests require live credentials.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for cloud provider launch claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Model comparison suite is opt-in.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run only for model comparison claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: GLM model e2e requires RUN_CLOUD_MODEL_TESTS.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for GLM provider claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Kimi model e2e requires RUN_CLOUD_MODEL_TESTS.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for Kimi provider claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: LFM model e2e requires provider availability.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for LFM provider claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: MiniMax model e2e requires RUN_CLOUD_MODEL_TESTS.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for MiniMax provider claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: MiniMax highspeed model e2e requires RUN_CLOUD_MODEL_TESTS.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for MiniMax provider claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: MiniMax model e2e requires RUN_CLOUD_MODEL_TESTS.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for MiniMax provider claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Qwen local model e2e is skipped in CI or without local backend.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for Qwen/local-provider claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Qwen Coder local model e2e is skipped in CI or without local backend.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for Qwen/local-provider claims.
